TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_John_Block, title = John_Block, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/John_Block} }

S.FORM: John Block sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, John Block, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

John Block sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1944, ryax sa tay 16 nqu tay 4, John Block, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: *oħn βloʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, *oħn βloʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
